title: Staff: Matthew Lee
display_label: Matthew Lee — Senior Grants and Contract Manager
staff_title: Senior Grants and Contract Manager, Office of Research Administration
content:
Mr. Matthew Lee is the Senior Grants and Contract Manager, Office of Research Administration.

Office: Tyler Hall, Suite 304. Phone: 443-885-4390. Email: matthew.lee@morgan.edu.

Mr. Matthew Lee is the Senior Grants and Contract Manager for the Office of Research Administration. He joined Morgan State University in January 2020.

He is responsible for reviewing contracts and sub-awards for legal sufficiency, based on guidelines provided by the Office of General Counsel. Mr. Lee also ensures each agreement has the appropriate signatures to be fully executed. He works closely with the Grant Manager and Budget Officers to ensure contract accuracy.

Prior to joining Morgan State, Mr. Lee worked as supervisor for a team of account advisors at a large telecommunications company. His customers included the Department of Defense, Department of Justice, and U.S. Department of Agriculture — with contract management, reporting, and invoicing as critical functions. He brings over 10 years of leadership experience and over 15 years of customer-focused service.

Mr. Lee is a Morgan alumnus.

Education: MBA, University of Phoenix; BS in Marketing, Morgan State University.
